display.purpose: Hero titles on landing pages. Bounded 2.5rem ceiling; Onetone doesn't shout.

headline.purpose: Section titles. One per section, not one per subsection.

title.purpose: Card titles, dialog titles, dense heading contexts.

body.purpose: Default reading text. Line length capped at 65–75ch on prose.

label.purpose: Tracked uppercase eyebrow — status pills and metric callouts only, NOT section scaffolding.

mono.purpose: Order numbers, receipt lines, monetary tables. Never for prose or headings.

shadows.name: resting
shadows.purpose: Default card resting state. Carries tonal separation without drama.

shadows.name: lifted
shadows.purpose: Hover on interactive cards, dropdown menus, dialogs.

shadows.name: gold-glow
shadows.purpose: Warm gold glow under primary CTA. Only shadow that carries a color.

shadows.name: sticky-footer-up
shadows.purpose: Upward-facing subtle shadow for sticky POS cart footer. Separates BAYAR bar from scrolling list.

motion.name: ease-out-standard
motion.purpose: Default easing for hover/focus transitions. Exponential ease-out; no bounce.

motion.name: duration-quick
motion.purpose: Hover state changes on buttons, chips.

motion.name: duration-standard
motion.purpose: Card hover, dropdown open, dialog fade.

motion.name: fadeInUp
motion.purpose: Entrance for section content on landing. Must degrade on prefers-reduced-motion.

motion.name: gold-shimmer
motion.purpose: Brand mark shimmer. Only permitted gradient text. Pauses on prefers-reduced-motion.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The one gold CTA. Solid Signature Gold fill on Vault Black text. Reserved for the single primary action per screen.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.5rem; height: 2.25rem; padding: 0 1rem; font-family: 'Geist', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 700; color: #0A0A0A; background: #C9A84C; border: none; border-radius: 0.625rem; box-shadow: 0 10px 15px -3px rgba(201, 168, 76, 0.2); cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1), transform 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #E0BC6A; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(201, 168, 76, 0.5), 0 10px 15px -3px rgba(201, 168, 76, 0.2); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(1px); }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Secondary confirm or destructive-cancel. Warm Coal border on transparent bg.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.5rem; height: 2.25rem; padding: 0 1rem; font-family: 'Geist', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: #F5F0E8; background: transparent; border: 1px solid #2A2520; border-radius: 0.625rem; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1), color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: #1E1A10; color: #C9A84C; } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(201, 168, 76, 0.5); }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Table row action, icon-only action, quantity stepper. No border, no fill until hover.
components.html: <button class="ds-btn-ghost" aria-label="Hapus"><svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M3 6h18M8 6V4a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h4a2 2 0 0 1 2 2v2m3 0v14a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H7a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V6h14z"/></svg></button>
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 2rem; height: 2rem; padding: 0; color: #7A7468; background: transparent; border: none; border-radius: 0.5rem; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1), color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: #1E1A10; color: #EF4444; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(201, 168, 76, 0.5); }

components.name: Card
components.description: Container with Panel Black fill and Warm Coal border. Sits one step above the vault background.
components.html:
SESI KASIR
Sesi #12 aktif
Dibuka 07:30 · modal Rp 500.000 · kasir Wawan
components.css: .ds-card { padding: 1.5rem; background: #141414; color: #F5F0E8; border: 1px solid #2A2520; border-radius: 0.75rem; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05); transition: box-shadow 300ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); font-family: 'Geist', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-card:hover { box-shadow: 0 4px 6px -1px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1), 0 2px 4px -2px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); } .ds-card-eyebrow { font-size: 0.6875rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #7A7468; margin-bottom: 0.375rem; } .ds-card-title { font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.35; color: #F5F0E8; margin-bottom: 0.375rem; } .ds-card-body { font-size: 0.875rem; line-height: 1.55; color: #7A7468; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Studio Black fill, Warm Coal border, gold focus ring. Placeholder is Weathered Bronze at 4.5:1 contrast.
components.css: .ds-input { display: block; width: 100%; height: 2.25rem; padding: 0.25rem 0.75rem; font-family: 'Geist', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; color: #F5F0E8; background: #1C1C1C; border: 1px solid #2A2520; border-radius: 0.625rem; outline: none; transition: border-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1), box-shadow 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #7A7468; } .ds-input:focus-visible { border-color: #C9A84C; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(201, 168, 76, 0.5); }

components.name: Gold Badge
components.description: Gold-hinted status pill on Gilt Shadow bg. The 'utama' badge, featured tag, brand-emphasis marker.
components.css: .ds-badge-gold { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 0.125rem 0.5rem; font-family: 'Geist', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; color: #C9A84C; background: rgba(201, 168, 76, 0.1); border: 1px solid rgba(201, 168, 76, 0.3); border-radius: 0.625rem; }

components.name: Filter Chip
components.description: Category filter chip in POS and product listing. Pill radius, Studio Black at rest, Signature Gold when active.
components.css: .ds-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 0.375rem 0.75rem; margin-right: 0.5rem; font-family: 'Geist', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; color: #F5F0E8; background: #1C1C1C; border: none; border-radius: 9999px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1), color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-chip:hover { background: #2A2520; } .ds-chip-active { background: #C9A84C; color: #0A0A0A; } .ds-chip-active:hover { background: #E0BC6A; } .ds-chip:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(201, 168, 76, 0.5); }

components.name: Sidebar Nav Item
components.description: Admin sidebar navigation. Active state uses Signature Gold with gold-glow shadow; inactive is Weathered Bronze hovering to Warm Paper.
components.html: Kasir (POS)Sesi POSProdukPesanan
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0.125rem; padding: 0.75rem; background: #1E1E1E; border-right: 1px solid #2A2520; font-family: 'Geist', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-nav-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.75rem; padding: 0.625rem 0.75rem; font-size: 0.8125rem; font-weight: 500; color: #7A7468; text-decoration: none; border-radius: 0.5rem; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1), color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-nav-item:hover { background: #1E1A10; color: #F5F0E8; } .ds-nav-active { background: #C9A84C; color: #0A0A0A; box-shadow: 0 4px 6px -1px rgba(201, 168, 76, 0.2); } .ds-nav-active:hover { background: #C9A84C; color: #0A0A0A; }

components.name: POS Cart Footer
components.description: The signature sticky BAYAR bar. Sits at the bottom of the cashier cart panel with an upward shadow separating it from the scrolling item list above.
components.css: .ds-cart-footer { flex-shrink: 0; padding: 0.75rem 1rem; background: #141414; border-top: 1px solid #2A2520; box-shadow: 0 -4px 12px -4px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.06); font-family: 'Geist', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-cart-total-row { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; margin-bottom: 0.5rem; } .ds-cart-total-label { font-size: 0.875rem; color: #7A7468; } .ds-cart-total-value { font-size: 1.25rem; font-weight: 700; color: #F5F0E8; } .ds-cart-bayar { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 100%; padding: 0.75rem 1rem; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 700; color: #0A0A0A; background: #C9A84C; border: none; border-radius: 0.625rem; box-shadow: 0 10px 15px -3px rgba(201, 168, 76, 0.2); cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-cart-bayar:hover { background: #E0BC6A; }

narrative.overview: Onetone is a display case, not a market stall. Everything on screen is arranged the way a flagship boutique arranges a vitrine at midnight: a controlled darkness that lets one product breathe, a signature gold accent that appears only when it means something, and typography that behaves like the tiny plaque under a museum piece — informative, restrained, never shouting. The system explicitly rejects three temptations: marketplace clutter (Shopee/Tokopedia neon), SaaS-cream landing pages (2025 paper/parchment body with huge display heading and testimonial slider), and gradient-orb dashboards (glass card floating in mesh purple). Two personas share the same visual family. Customer surfaces lean editorial — product photography as hero, generous vertical rhythm, one gold accent per screen. Admin/POS surfaces lean functional — dense tables, quick-tap actions, gold reserved for status and primary CTAs. Both breathe the same dark air.
keyCharacteristics: Body-black canvas (#0A0A0A), warm off-white ink (#F5F0E8) — never mid-gray
Signature Gold (#C9A84C) as the one voice: primary CTA, active state, focus ring, brand accent
Tonal layering (background → surface → card → popover) instead of shadow-heavy elevation
Radius base 0.75rem (12px) — soft but architectural; no full-rounded pills except pass-through utilities
Geist Sans throughout (Geist Mono for numbers, receipts, order numbers)
Motion is a response, not a spectacle: hover/focus transitions, one branded gold-shimmer for the brand mark

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: Signature Gold appears on ≤10% of any screen. If a page has a gold primary button, gold price emphasis, and a gold section eyebrow, one of them is wrong. Its rarity is its power.

rules.name: The One Border Rule
rules.body: Warm Coal (#2A2520) is the only border color. No blue borders on inputs, no red borders on error states, no 'outline' variant with a novel border color. One border, everywhere.

rules.name: The Never-Gray Text Rule
rules.body: Muted text is Weathered Bronze (#7A7468), not a cool slate. If a warm-black background pairs with a cool-gray text, the page reads clinical — the wrong register.

rules.name: The Sparing Eyebrow Rule
rules.body: The 0.6875rem tracked uppercase label is legitimate for section metric callouts and status pills — not as a scaffold above every heading. If four sections in a row start with a tiny uppercase label, it's AI grammar, not brand voice.

rules.name: The Balanced Heading Rule
rules.body: Every h1/h2/h3 uses text-wrap: balance. Long prose (product description, article body) uses text-wrap: pretty to reduce orphans.

rules.name: The Rupiah Precision Rule
rules.body: Currency is rendered with formatRupiah(): 'Rp 175.000' with a thin space and dot-separated thousands. Never 'Rp175000', never 'IDR 175K', never comma-decimal (comma is decimal in id-ID).

rules.name: The Tonal-First Rule
rules.body: Depth via ramp before shadow. If a card needs to 'pop', the answer is to darken the background around it, not to raise its shadow.

rules.name: The Never-Neutral-Shadow Rule
rules.body: No shadow larger than shadow-md on flat surfaces. If a card looks bookmarked, framed, or floating in a modal, the elevation is wrong; use tonal separation and Warm Coal border instead.

dos: Do use Signature Gold (#C9A84C) as the one primary accent per screen. Its rarity is the point.
Do carry the tonal ramp (#0A0A0A → #141414 → #1C1C1C → #1E1E1E) instead of drop shadows for depth.
Do keep body text at Warm Paper (#F5F0E8), muted text at Weathered Bronze (#7A7468). Both meet 4.5:1 contrast.
Do format currency via formatRupiah(): Rp 175.000 — thin space + dot-separated thousands.
Do use unoptimized prop on <Image> for R2-hosted product images. Next.js optimizer fails on external CDN under some conditions.
Do set focus rings on all interactive elements using Signature Gold at 50% opacity. Keyboard nav is a design surface.
Do use Geist Mono only for order numbers, receipt lines, and monetary tables — never for prose or headings.
Do respect prefers-reduced-motion: the gold shimmer, fadeInUp, and float animations must degrade to static.
donts: Don't make it a marketplace (Shopee/Tokopedia). No neon flash-sale badges, no 'Terlaris' red banners, no five-star cluster on product cards, no bright orange CTAs.
Don't make it a SaaS-cream landing page. No warm off-white body background (paper/parchment/linen/bone), no huge display heading with testimonial slider, no 'Trusted by 10,000+' logo strip.
Don't ship a gradient hero with 3D orb/blob. No mesh gradient (purple/blue), no glassmorphism card floating over blur. The only permitted gradient text is the Gold Shimmer brand mark.
Don't use border-left greater than 1px as a colored stripe on cards, alerts, or list items. Use bg tint, leading numbers/icons, or nothing.
Don't stack a text-[10px] uppercase tracked eyebrow above every section. That's AI scaffolding. Use it for status pills and metric labels only.
Don't number sections as page scaffolding (01 · Product, 02 · Cart) unless it's a real ordered flow.
Don't introduce a second border color, second family, or second accent. One border (Warm Coal), one family (Geist), one accent (Signature Gold).
Don't use gray-500 or cool slate for muted text. It looks clinical on a warm-dark canvas. Use Weathered Bronze (#7A7468).
Don't animate layout properties (width, height, top, left, margin). Animate transform, opacity, background, box-shadow, filter.
Don't ship display heading > 2.5rem clamp ceiling. Onetone doesn't shout. If a heading feels small in a mockup, the mockup is too crowded — trim the page, don't scale the type.
